fields.name: Analysis View Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code for the analysis view that the filter belongs to.

fields.name: Date Filter
fields.tooltip: Specifies the dates that will be used to filter the amounts in the window.

fields.name: Account Filter
fields.tooltip: Specifies a filter for the general ledger accounts for which entries will be shown in the matrix window.

fields.name: Cash Flow Forecast Filter
fields.tooltip: Specifies the cash flow forecast that information in the matrix is shown for.

fields.name: Budget Filter
fields.tooltip: Specifies the budget that information in the matrix is shown for.

fields.name: Dimension 1 Filter
fields.tooltip: Specifies a filter for the Dimension 1 for which entries will be shown in the matrix window.

fields.name: Dimension 2 Filter
fields.tooltip: Specifies a filter for the Dimension 2 for which entries will be shown in the matrix window.

fields.name: Dimension 3 Filter
fields.tooltip: Specifies a filter for the Dimension 3 for which entries will be shown in the matrix window.

fields.name: Dimension 4 Filter
fields.tooltip: Specifies a filter for the Dimension 4 for which entries will be shown in the matrix window.

fields.name: Show Actual/Budgets
fields.tooltip: Specifies if the selected value is shown in the window.

fields.name: Show Amount Field
fields.tooltip: Specifies the type of entries that will be included in the matrix window. The Amount options means that amounts that are the sum of debit and credit amounts are shown.

fields.name: Closing Entries
fields.tooltip: Specifies whether the amounts shown in the matrix window will include closing entries.

fields.name: Rounding Factor
fields.tooltip: Specifies the factor that is used to round the amounts.

fields.name: Show In Add. Currency
fields.tooltip: Specifies if the reported amounts are shown in the additional reporting currency.

fields.name: Show Column Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies that the names of columns are shown in the matrix window.

fields.name: Show Opposite Sign
fields.tooltip: Specifies whether to show debits as negative amounts (with minus signs) and credits as positive amounts in the matrix window.

fields.name: Period Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies by which period amounts are displayed.

fields.name: Column Set
fields.tooltip: Specifies the range of values that are displayed in the matrix window, for example, the total period. To change the contents of the field, choose Next Set or Previous Set.

fields.name: Amount Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies how amounts are displayed. Net Change: The net change in the balance for the selected period. Balance at Date: The balance as of the last day in the selected period.
